            onChange={(e) => setCreateUserSetAsHead(e.target.checked)}
          />
          Set as head/approver of employee's department

preservedBehaviors.description: route.js validates email requiring valid format
route.js validates termStartDate and termEndDate as ISO dates
route.js handles existing users by upserting company_users
CreateUserModal renders a checkbox for setAsHead
UsersPage defines canManageUsers based on admin/manager/operations/director/super_admin roles
route.js includes normalizeDepartmentIdArray and validateDepartmentsExist for headDepartmentIds
route.js builds headDeptIds array with deptId included when shouldBeDeptHead, with deduplication
UsersPage includes departmentsQuery.isFetching in isLoading condition
route.js derives shouldBeDeptHead from role === dept_head OR setAsDepartmentHead
UsersPage renders department error banner when departmentsQuery.isError
UsersPage passes company in the departments query enable condition
